title: nmstate bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:

- Upgrade to 2.2.49
- Ignore desired MAC for bonds with fail_over_mac. RHEL-106135
- Fix setting DNS only with search or option. RHEL-102333
